# Status command result

JSON output for `harness status`.

- Schema JSON: [status.result.schema.json](../../../../schema/commands/status.result.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.StatusResult`

## Root Shape

StatusResult is the JSON result returned by `harness status`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `artifacts` | `StatusArtifacts` | no | Artifacts points to stable paths or identifiers that help the caller locate related contract artifacts. |
| `blockers` | `array<ErrorDetail>` | no | Blockers lists state issues that block ordinary execution progression. |
| `command` | `string` | yes | Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload. |
| `errors` | `array<ErrorDetail>` | no | Errors lists hard failures that prevented full state resolution. |
| `facts` | `StatusFacts` | no | Facts carries selected high-signal derived details that help explain the current node. |
| `next_actions` | `array<NextAction> | null` | yes | NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order. |
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes | OK reports whether the command succeeded. |
| `state` | `StatusState` | yes | State is the canonical workflow position resolved for the current worktree. |
| `summary` | `string` | yes | Summary is the concise human-readable explanation of the current state. |
| `warnings` | `array<string>` | no | Warnings lists non-blocking workflow reminders or ambiguity notes. |

## Definitions

## ErrorDetail

ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | `string` | yes | Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem. |
| `path` | `string` | yes | Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error. |

## NextAction

NextAction describes one concrete follow-up action that the caller should consider after reading a command result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `command` | `string | null` | yes | Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command. |
| `description` | `string` | yes | Description explains the suggested next step in plain language. |

## StatusArtifacts

StatusArtifacts lists stable paths or identifiers related to the current status result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ci_record_id` | `string` | no | CIRecordID is the latest CI evidence record identifier when known. |
| `last_landed_at` | `string` | no | LastLandedAt is the timestamp of the most recent landed plan. |
| `last_landed_plan_path` | `string` | no | LastLandedPlanPath is the most recent landed plan path when the repository is otherwise idle. |
| `local_state_path` | `string` | no | LocalStatePath is the plan-local state cache path when one exists. Examples: `.local/harness/plans/2026-03-31-centralize-contract-schemas-and-generated-reference-docs/state.json`. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | no | PlanPath is the active, archived, or last-landed plan path relevant to the current status resolution. Examples: `docs/plans/active/2026-03-31-centralize-contract-schemas-and-generated-reference-docs.md`. |
| `publish_record_id` | `string` | no | PublishRecordID is the latest publish evidence record identifier when known. |
| `review_round_id` | `string` | no | ReviewRoundID is the active review round identifier when review is in flight. |
| `sync_record_id` | `string` | no | SyncRecordID is the latest sync evidence record identifier when known. |

## StatusFacts

StatusFacts carries selected derived details that help interpret a status node without dumping the full local state model.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `archive_blocker_count` | `integer` | no | ArchiveBlockerCount reports how many archive-readiness blockers are still present. |
| `ci_status` | `string` | no | CIStatus summarizes the latest CI evidence state. |
| `current_step` | `string` | no | CurrentStep is the first unfinished plan step when one exists. |
| `land_commit` | `string` | no | LandCommit is the merge commit or landed commit recorded for the land phase. |
| `land_pr_url` | `string` | no | LandPRURL is the pull request URL recorded for the land phase. |
| `pr_url` | `string` | no | PRURL is the currently known pull request URL for the candidate branch. |
| `publish_status` | `string` | no | PublishStatus summarizes the latest publish evidence state. |
| `reopen_mode` | `string` | no | ReopenMode is the active reopen mode when a reopen repair path is in effect. |
| `review_kind` | `string` | no | ReviewKind is the review kind for the active review round. |
| `review_status` | `string` | no | ReviewStatus summarizes the aggregate review state for the current node. |
| `review_title` | `string` | no | ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for the active review round when one exists. |
| `review_trigger` | `string` | no | ReviewTrigger is the derived reason label for the active review round. |
| `revision` | `integer` | no | Revision is the current plan-local revision number. |
| `sync_status` | `string` | no | SyncStatus summarizes the latest remote-sync evidence state. |

## StatusResult

StatusResult is the JSON result returned by `harness status`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `artifacts` | `StatusArtifacts` | no | Artifacts points to stable paths or identifiers that help the caller locate related contract artifacts. |
| `blockers` | `array<ErrorDetail>` | no | Blockers lists state issues that block ordinary execution progression. |
| `command` | `string` | yes | Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload. |
| `errors` | `array<ErrorDetail>` | no | Errors lists hard failures that prevented full state resolution. |
| `facts` | `StatusFacts` | no | Facts carries selected high-signal derived details that help explain the current node. |
| `next_actions` | `array<NextAction> | null` | yes | NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order. |
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes | OK reports whether the command succeeded. |
| `state` | `StatusState` | yes | State is the canonical workflow position resolved for the current worktree. |
| `summary` | `string` | yes | Summary is the concise human-readable explanation of the current state. |
| `warnings` | `array<string>` | no | Warnings lists non-blocking workflow reminders or ambiguity notes. |

## StatusState

StatusState is the canonical workflow node returned by `harness status`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `current_node` | `string` | yes | CurrentNode is the resolved v0.2 workflow node for the current worktree. Examples: `execution/step-1/implement`. |
